hero.title: The Ultimate Minecraft Hub
hero.subtitle: Search players, monitor servers and follow live Mojang news in one place. Built by the community, for the community.

dimensions.title: Dive into the worlds
dimensions.description: From the lush Overworld to the fiery Nether and the mysterious End. Learn everything about each dimension.
dimensions.overworldDesc: Lush forests, towering mountains and endless biomes — the world every Minecraft journey begins in.
dimensions.netherDesc: A hellish realm of lava oceans, soul valleys and fortresses guarded by piglins and ghasts.
dimensions.endDesc: A void of obsidian pillars where the Ender Dragon roams. The final frontier of every save.

features.playerSearchDesc: Look up any Java player by username or UUID.
features.serverStatusDesc: Real-time status for any Java or Bedrock server.
features.skinViewerDesc: Full 3D preview with capes and animations.
features.liveNewsDesc: Aggregated feed from Mojang and the community.
